messages.content: FW/1 action should read optional rc.status and populate prc.users from a service.
Create FW/1 before() logic that normalizes page number into rc.page with safe default.
Write a FW/1 onError() handler that logs error and sets user-safe prc message.
Implement a service method returning a struct summary for dashboard stats in FW/1 app.
Show DI/1 property injection in a FW/1 service for repository dependency.
Create a subsystem setup function that maps /admin to admin subsystem.
Demonstrate FW/1 form post action that validates rc and redirects after successful save.
Show when to use beanFactory.getBean in a controller compared to property injection.
